subject: TypeScript entry point moved from cdr-tokens.d.mts to types/index.d.ts
consumerImpact: Consumers referencing the old .d.mts path directly must switch to the package root import

crossRepoImpact.description: rei-cedar type imports must align with the new entry point

migrationSteps: If importing from the package root, no change needed
If referencing cdr-tokens.d.mts directly, switch to import from '@rei/cdr-tokens'

subject: Package.json exports map restructured with explicit per-category entry points
after: explicit per-category entry points (css/color, scss/space, types/breakpoint, etc.)
consumerImpact: Direct dist/ path imports may no longer resolve; consumers must use per-category entry points

crossRepoImpact.description: rei-cedar internal token imports must use the new export paths

migrationSteps: Replace direct dist/ imports with per-category entry points

subject: Per-foundation dist outputs relocated to dist/*/foundations/
consumerImpact: Consumers referencing dist files directly must update paths to the foundations/ subdirectory
migrationSteps: Use per-category import paths instead of direct dist references
If direct dist paths are required, update from dist/*/cdr-<category>.* to dist/*/foundations/<category>.*

subject: Root type export surface changed to per-foundation modules via types/index.d.ts
after: per-foundation type modules re-exported from types/index.d.ts
consumerImpact: Most consumers will see no change; those importing removed type names must check per-foundation modules
migrationSteps: If your code compiles after upgrading, no action needed
If specific type names are missing, check the per-foundation type modules (e.g., types/color, types/space)

subject: Per-category token imports via package.json exports map
after: per-category imports: css/color, scss/space, types/breakpoint, etc.
consumerImpact: Teams can import only the token categories they need, reducing bundle size

subject: Kebab-case key union types per foundation
after: CdrColorKey, CdrSpaceKey, etc. — typed kebab-case key unions
consumerImpact: TypeScript consumers can reference token keys directly without string transformation

subject: CdrBreakpointOrder typed const tuple export
after: CdrBreakpointOrder — typed const tuple of breakpoint names in order
consumerImpact: Responsive logic can import the canonical breakpoint order instead of hardcoding it

subject: DTCG-aligned typography token format
after: W3C Design Token Community Group composite format ($value, $type, $description)
consumerImpact: Design tooling that reads DTCG format (Tokens Studio, Figma Variables) can consume Cedar typography tokens directly

subject: Per-foundation TypeScript type modules
before: monolithic declaration file requiring skipLibCheck workarounds
after: per-foundation .d.ts files with correct type narrowing
consumerImpact: Editor autocomplete and rename refactors work correctly for token names without workarounds
